title: roegneria mutabilis
intro: Roegneria mutabilis, also known as the 'Changeable Grass', is a type of grass found in the mountainous regions of China. It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral effects. The health benefits of Roegneria mutabilis include reducing fever, relieving pain and swelling, and treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. Herbal preparations of Roegneria mutabilis typically involve drying the grass, which can then be made into teas, infusions, or capsules for consumption.
